chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. NO.S- 164 OF 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE HEARING OF CASE 1. FOR ORDERS ON OFFICE OBJECTIONS 2. FOR HEARING OF MAIN CASE. 12.03.2025 Mr. Khalid Saifullah Simair Advocate for the Petitioners alongwith Petitioners Mr. Abdul Razzak Tunio Advocate for the Respondent No.12 SIP/SHO Hussain Tahir, SIO Raza Mohammad, SIP/SHO Ali Haider PS Waggan -x-x-x-x-x-x- Petitioners are present in Court. Petitioner No.1 states that she has solominized marriage with her own freewill, she has not been abducted by anyone and is living with Petitioner No.2 happily. On notice the private respondents have appeared. On the request of mother of petitioner No.1 a meeting was arranged with Petitioner No.1 and after meeting the Petitioner states that she has respect for her mother but she would be happy to reside with Petitioner No.2. Since the Petitioner No.1 has made statement that she has not been abducted as she contracted marriage with her freewill which right guaranteed under the Constitution. It is stated that a FIR in this case has been registered by the father of petitioner No.1 which is without substance as she has not been abducted by anyone as she by exercising her right and choice has contracted marriage with petitioner No.2. Concerned investigating officer P.S. Waggan, district Kamber Shahdad Kot is in attendance and states that he has recorded 161, Cr.P.C. statement of the petitioner and she has not been abducted. Alongwith his reply he has filed copy of FIR No.17/2025 under Section 452/365-B/34 PPC. Since the petitioners apprehend danger to their lives at the hands of their parents, the SHO PS Malir shall ensure that no harm is caused to the petitioners and ensure their protection in accordance with law.

Alongwith his reply he has filed copy of FIR No.17/2025 under Section 452/365-B/34 PPC. Since the petitioners apprehend danger to their lives at the hands of their parents, the SHO PS Malir shall ensure that no harm is caused to the petitioners and ensure their protection in accordance with law. Petition is disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E MUSHARRAF ALI
